reference_files.topic: Glossary of $VAR placeholders used across all snips
Funnel map: service profile + deployment + attributes -> exact service / interface / filter snip per OS
Per-tier snip lists for `minimum` / `with-cos` / `as-deployed` configuration form
Auto-fill rules: lab-default instance names, RDs, RTs, VLAN/unit sequences, ESI shape, device selection
Required output format: YAML Inputs block, per-device fenced blocks, Notes section
